title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Rupauli
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Rupauli assembly segment.

title: Political rally in Rupauli draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Rupauli promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.
